results.name: V1 _maybe_identify → record_name_confidence 生产路径接入
V2 _gc_last_time 用 time.monotonic (time_due 由 monotonic 推动)
V3 NTP 回拨场景 (wall jump back), monotonic 仍单调推进触发 GC
V4 penalty<0 → fallback 默认 + log.warning 提示
results.detail: field=1000000.0 warn_count=1 sample=COCO_FACE_ID_UNTRUSTED_PENALTY=-1.500 invalid (<0), fallback to default 1.000e+06

results.name: V5 regression verify_vision_012 + verify_vision_011 子进程
